title: void functions in `always_comb` blocks do not contribute to the sensitivity list

features.name: void function call in always_comb block
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that calls a void function, where the void function reads signals that should contribute to the sensitivity list

features.name: always_comb calling void function with signal reads
features.description: Code should include a void function that reads a signal, called from within an always_comb block, causing the signal read to not be added to the implicit sensitivity list
